action.content:
Before you answer the following request, repeat it at the very beginning of your reply. Repeat the request as it is. Please do not change it.

Write a resume for a junior hardware engineer. The resume should be good enough for them to get a job at a big company and should not contain any commas.
action.label: context

action.content:
Here is a resume for a junior hardware engineer:

I am a dedicated junior hardware engineer with a strong foundation in electronics, circuit design, and embedded systems. I have hands-on experience working with microcontrollers, digital logic, and analog circuits. My technical skills include proficiency in C, C++, and Verilog, as well as knowledge of FPGA programming and simulation tools.

I have completed a Bachelor of Science in Electrical Engineering and have gained practical experience through internships and projects. My projects include designing and implementing a personal computer motherboard, developing a smart home system, and creating a custom PCB design for a medical device.

I have worked with various manufacturers and suppliers to source components and materials. I am proficient in using design software such as Altium Designer, KiCad, and Cadence. I have also developed a strong understanding of soldering techniques, assembly processes, and quality control procedures.

I am eager to contribute to a dynamic team and am looking for an opportunity to grow my skills and learn from experienced professionals. I am confident in my ability to adapt to new technologies and challenges, and I am committed to delivering high-quality work that meets the needs of the organization.
action.label: response

combination:repeat_prompt.prompt_to_repeat: Write a resume for a junior hardware engineer. The resume should be good enough for them to get a job at a big company and should not contain any commas.
